editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 3, 2026: Global Headlines, Markets, Hacker News, Product Hunt
editionData.description: A daily brief for May 3, 2026 covering global headlines, market closes, Hacker News, and Product Hunt.
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: How Germany May Have Misjudged Trump’s Anger on Iran
headlines.summary: Germany had appeared not to believe President Trump’s threats to pull troops from the country. Once it was announced, Berlin offered a measured response.

headlines.title: After Trump’s Ousting of Maduro, Little Has Changed for Most Venezuelans
headlines.summary: U.S. officials say they will “unleash prosperity” by commandeering the oil industry. Many people in Caracas say it will take far more than that.

headlines.title: U.S. to Withdraw 5,000 Troops From Germany. But Thousands Will Remain.
headlines.summary: The U.S. military has tens of thousands of personnel in Germany, more than in any other foreign country but Japan. Their significance extends well beyond Europe.

headlines.title: UK Driving-Test Backlog Leaves Learners Waiting Months
headlines.summary: The average wait for a test in England and Scotland has hit 22 weeks, up from five weeks before the pandemic, leading to frustration and attempts to jump the line.

headlines.title: U.S. Fast-Tracks Arms Deals Valued at $8.6 Billion to Mideast Partners
headlines.summary: The Persian Gulf countries and Israel have faced repeated Iranian attacks during the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. The State Department move bypassed congressional review.

headlines.title: Trump reviews Iranian peace proposal, warns strikes could resume
Trump says he will review Iran’s new 14-point plan; Israel pounds Lebanon
Timmy the humpback whale escapes to the North Sea
At least six dead in heavy rains in northeast Brazil, thousands displaced
Khartoum drone strike kills five in Sudan, NGO reports
Germany says U.S. troop withdrawal 'anticipated', Spain and Italy could be next
headlines.summary: Germany's defense minister is playing down the impact of the Pentagon's decision to pull 5,000 troops from the country, but the move has rattled NATO allies and added to growing fears that Europe can no longer rely on Washington.

headlines.title: Bard College's president to retire after scrutiny of relationship with Jeffrey Epstein
headlines.summary: The longtime president of Bard College in New York has announced his retirement, months after it was revealed that he had a much deeper relationship than was previously known with Jeffrey Epstein.

headlines.title: Golden Tempo takes the Kentucky Derby as Cherie DeVaux becomes the 1st woman to train its winner
headlines.summary: Golden Tempo has won the Kentucky Derby at odds of 23-1 to make Cherie DeVaux the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown.

headlines.title: Iran submits 14-point response to U.S. proposal to end war
headlines.summary: Iran has presented a 14-point response to the U.S. proposal to end the war, according to Iranian state media.

headlines.title: Timmy the stranded whale rescued after weekslong effort
headlines.summary: Timmy captured the hearts of whale lovers across the globe who rooted for a happy ending for the humpback.

headlines.title: US May Day rallies draw tens of thousands nationwide
headlines.summary: NEW YORK -- Tens of thousands of people took to the streets across the United States on Friday to join May Day rallies against the US-Israeli war on Iran and defend labor and immigrant rights.

headlines.title: BP criticized over surging profits following Iran war
headlines.summary: The United Kingdom-based oil and gas giant BP is facing criticism after reporting its profits more than doubled in the first quarter of the year, following a spike in oil prices since the Iran war began.

headlines.title: UAE exits oil groupings, eyes more output
headlines.summary: The United Arab Emirates is set to substantially ramp up its oil production capacity after quitting the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries and the broader OPEC+ alliance effective Friday, making a pivotal shift at a time when the war between the United States, Israel and Iran has triggered an energy crisis and roiled the global economy.

headlines.title: UK lawmakers reject Mandelson inquiry
headlines.summary: United Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer has escaped having a parliamentary inquiry opened into his appointment of Peter Mandelson to be the country’s ambassador to the United States, as the controversy that has dominated domestic politics recently shows no sign of going away.

headlines.title: Pentagon plans to withdraw 5,000 US troops from Germany: media
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON -- The Pentagon is planning to withdraw about 5,000 US troops from Germany, a senior defense official said Friday.

headlines.title: LPG tanker linked to India, Sarv Shakti, crosses Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Indian LPG tanker Sarv Shakti attempts to cross the Strait of Hormuz amidst regional tensions, carrying 45,000 tonnes of LPG.

headlines.title: Supreme Court to hear review pleas against verdict on Teachers’ Eligibility Test on May 13
headlines.summary: Supreme Court to review TET judgment on May 13, impacting livelihoods of over 25 lakh teachers across India.

headlines.title: NGT order warns of fines to southern States if clean air funds are not utilised
headlines.summary: NGT warns southern States of fines for under-utilising clean air funds, highlighting urgent need for effective pollution control measures

headlines.title: What is India’s new Cell Broadcast System? Everything you need to know
headlines.summary: Discover India's new Cell Broadcast System, designed for rapid emergency alerts during national disasters, tested by NDMA nationwide.

headlines.title: INDIA bloc likely to meet after poll results to discuss strategy on delimitation, women’s quota
headlines.summary: The INDIA bloc plans to strategize on delimitation and women's quota after May's Assembly election results, amid ongoing political tensions.

headlines.title: White House dinner shooting suspect seeks end of suicide precautions
Trump says there is possibility US could restart strikes on Iran
Trump says US could restart Iran strikes 'if they misbehave'
Airlines scramble to help stranded Spirit passengers after budget carrier collapses
Americans on a budget mourn loss of low-cost Spirit Airlines
